text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Symboli Rudolf helps the students ease into
the new year, she receives the news that Air
Groove has collapsed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The reason turns out to be from overwork, and
Rudolf blames herself for letting Air Groove's
schedule get so out of hand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove snaps back, saying that Rudolf
doesn't understand at all—words that seem to
strike home.
